zh.lifeSummary: Alice De Gant是William fitz Nigell和Alice De GAUNT的女兒，於1120年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆。她於1130年與William de Mohun Earl of Somerset在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1176年在英國林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾巴德尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice De Gant是William fitz Nigell和Alice De GAUNT的女儿，于1120年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆。她于1130年与William de Mohun Earl of Somerset在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1176年在英国林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾巴德尼。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gant
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ghent in Flanders, Belgium.
English: from Middle English gaunt, gant ‘slim, slender; drawn, thin and angular’.
North German: probably a variant of   Gans   ‘goose’.

variants.name: Gans
meanings: from gans ‘goose’, hence a metonymic occupational name for someone who bred or tended geese, or a nickname for someone who wobbled or behaved (foolishly) like a goose, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a goose.
nickname for a healthy or strong person, from Middle Low German gans ‘whole, complete, healthy’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Alice De Gant was born in 1120, in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of William fitz Nigell and Alice De GAUNT. She married William de Mohun Earl of Somerset in 1130, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died in 1176, in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Bardney, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice De Gant est née en 1120, à Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de William fitz Nigell et Alice De GAUNT. Elle a épousé William de Mohun Earl of Somerset en 1130, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée en 1176, à Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Bardney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Alice De Gant wurde 1120 in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von William fitz Nigell und Alice De GAUNT geboren. Sie hat 1130 in England, United Kingdom William de Mohun Earl of Somerset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb 1176 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Bardney, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Alice De Gant è nata il nel 1120 nel Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di William fitz Nigell e Alice De GAUNT. Lei sposato William de Mohun Earl of Somerset nel 1130, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1176, nel Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Bardney, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice De Gantは1120年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフォルキンガムでWilliam fitz NigellとAlice De GAUNTの娘として生まれた。1130年にイギリスイギリスでWilliam de Mohun Earl of Somersetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は1176年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフォルキンガムで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアバードニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice De Gant(은)는 1120년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 폴킨그함에서 William fitz Nigell(와)과 Alice De GAUNT의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1130년 영국 잉글랜드에서 William de Mohun Earl of Somerset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1176년 영국 링코실르 폴킨그함에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 바드니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alice De Gant nasceu em 1120, em Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de William fitz Nigell e Alice De GAUNT. Ela casou-se com William de Mohun Earl of Somerset em 1130, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1176, em Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Bardney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice De Gant родилась в 1120 г. в местности фолкингхам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали William fitz Nigell и Alice De GAUNT. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Mohun Earl of Somerset в 1130 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла в 1176 г. в местности фолкингхам, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности бардни, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Alice De Gant nació en 1120, en Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de William fitz Nigell y Alice De GAUNT. Se casó con William de Mohun Earl of Somerset en 1130, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1176, en Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Bardney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
